content: Execute Testing Gate - run all tests to ensure 100% pass rate
Verify 100% Oracle Harness Pass Rate (R comparison tests at 1e-10 tolerance)
Verify linting and style checks pass
Conduct Take Stock Assessment - evaluate progress toward surpassing R
Mandatory Code Audit using zen mcp tools
Plan next sprint iteration based on assessment
Implement summary() result caching using OnceLock for performance
Replace custom statistical approximations with statrs library
Implement IRLS algorithm for GLM functionality
Add fast path LM fitting for full-rank matrices
Expand formula parsing to support more R syntax features
